title: Opening for Production Engineer at Birla Tyres

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Birla Tyres
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Production Engineer looking for your next big career move? Birla Tyres in Hyderabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Birla Tyres:
Birla Tyres is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Birla Tyres!
